snippet.title: LIVE | [BM] MPL MY Season 17 Minggu 3 Hari 2
snippet.description:
BTRM dan TR masing-masing mencari mata untuk terus mengukuhkan kedudukan di dalam liga. Selepas beberapa siri kekecewaan, mampukah BTRM bangkit memburu kemenangan pertama mereka atau TR akan menjadi penghalang seterusnya? 


AC Esports pula bakal diuji oleh Invictus Gaming yang kini berada di kedudukan ketiga. Dengan kehadiran pemain baharu, mampukah AC kembali menemui rentak kemenangan atau sebaliknya?


Kemuncak malam ini! Rekod win streak bakal terlebur dalam perlawanan paling panas musim ini. Raja Segala Raja bertemu Sang Gergasi Merah. Adakah dominasi SRG akan berterusan, atau RRQ bakal menghentikannya? 


Sabtu | 18 April 2026 
⚔️ BTRM vs TR - 2:30 PM
⚔️ AC vs iG - 5:00 PM
⚔️ RRQ vs SRG - 8:15 PM


📌 MPL MY Arena, Level 6, Quill City Mall Convention Centre
🎟️ Pautan di bio


#MYtimeMYera #MPLMYS17 #S17Schedule #MLBB

snippet.title: Street Fighter | Official Trailer (2026 Movie)
snippet.description:
FIGHT! Watch the Official Trailer for #StreetFighterMovie, hitting theaters everywhere October 16.  

Set in 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu (Andrew Koji) and Ken Masters (Noah Centineo) are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li (Callina Liang) recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they don’t, it’s GAME OVER!

Helmed by director Kitao Sakurai, Street Fighter is set to bring the battle from the arcade to the big screen with Hadoukens, roundhouses, and all your favorite characters.

☄️ Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Summer after high school, when we first met
We'd make out in your Mustang to Radiohead
And on my eighteenth birthday, we got matching tattoos
Used to steal your parents' liquor and climb to the roof
Talked about our future like we had a clue
Never planned that one day, I'd be losing you

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Verse 2]
I was June, and you were my Johnny Cash
Never one without the other, we made a pact
Sometimes when I miss you, I put those records on, woah
Someone said you had your tattoo removed
Saw you downtown, singing the blues
It's time to face the music, I'm no longer your muse

[Chorus]
But in another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Post-Chorus]
The one
The one
The one
The one that got away

[Bridge]
All this money can't buy me a time machine, no
Can't replace you with a million rings, no
I should've told you what you meant to me, woah
'Cause now I pay the price

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away (The one that got away)

[Post-Chorus]
The one (The one)
The one (The one)
The one (The one)
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

snippet.title: DIOR大穎 - 靠關係 MUTUAL FRIENDS - (Official MV)
snippet.description:
每一段關係 走到終點的時候
好像就只能靠著共同好友 來得知對方消息

那些接收訊息後
假裝不屑一顧毫不在乎的自己
都是我們必須要走的經歷

無論結局是否如意
曾經的情感 都是真的

在一次次的收到消息後 
慢慢習慣 接受 釋懷
習慣了 再也沒有交集
接受了 人生難免會有的不如預期
釋懷了 一切曾經一起擁有過的回憶

我在這段還可以靠關係的關係里
一點一點的 學會放過自己



《靠關係 Mutual Friends》

家突然變得好安靜 物品擺放得好整齊
少了個人嘮叨叮嚀  快樂反而不容易

那些美好曾經 畢竟都只是曾經
一切在凋零 悔恨灑落 滿地

今後我們只能靠關係  來打聽著彼此的消息
朋友之間不能說的話題 關於你 不曾再提起
今後我們不再有關係  曲終人散就該關上心
用呼吸來紀念你 失去了才珍惜  回憶終究只能回憶

少了個人嘮叨叮嚀  快樂反而不容易
那些美好曾經 畢竟都只是曾經
一切在凋零 悔恨灑落 滿地

今後我們只能靠關係  來打聽著彼此的消息
朋友之間不能說的話題 關於你 不曾再提起
今後我們不再有關係  曲終人散就該關上心
用呼吸來紀念你 失去了才珍惜  回憶終究只能回憶

人生本來就不公平  
更何況是感情  沒人跟你講道理
淚水烙印過的痕跡  下次學著更聰明
幸福需要一再練習  
幾次刻骨銘心  等一次的幸運
至少還活著 有一口氣 我就還能夠相信

最後我們只能靠關係  來打聽著彼此的消息
想起了我們最後的約定 我還是那麼不爭氣
從今以後不再有關係  
但我還是 真心祝福你
請好好 照顧自己 這次我不在意 我們會有什麼 結局

snippet.title: [Official Trailer] WU อู #WUTheSeries
snippet.description:
พีท (นานิ หิรัญกฤษฎิ์) ชายหนุ่มผู้อับโชคซึ่งมีเศษวิญญาณปีศาจอยู่ในตัว ทำให้สัมผัสได้ถึง เหยาพลังงานประหลาดที่ออกมากลืนกินพลังชีวิตของผู้คน จึงได้พบกับ นิรันดร์ (สกาย วงศ์รวี) ชายหนุ่มที่นำพาให้เขาเข้าไปในโลกแห่ง “อู” ทั้งสองได้กลายเป็นคู่หูจำเป็นและได้รวบรวมทีมเพื่อร่วมกันปราบเหยาและปัดเป่าสิ่งชั่วร้าย!
 
 นิรันดร์ พีท และทีมปราบปีศาจจะร่วมมือกันผ่านพ้นอุปสรรคได้ไหม และความสัมพันธ์ของทั้งคู่จะผูกพันกันด้วยจิตวิญญาณได้อย่างไร ติดตามได้ใน “WU อู” ทุกวันอังคาร เวลา 20:30 น. ทางช่อง GMM25 รับชมย้อนหลังที่แรกได้ที่ VIU เวลา 21:30 น. เริ่ม 5 พฤษภาคมนี้

snippet.title: Evil Dead Burn | Date Announce Teaser
snippet.description:
Nowhere to hide. 🔥 #EvilDeadBurn only in theaters July 10. Full trailer coming soon.


Evil Dead Burn unleashes the franchise’s most savage and terrifying ride to date, blazing onto big screens with an all-new chapter of carnage and demonic mayhem. After the loss of her husband, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws in their secluded family home. As one by one they are transformed into Deadites—turning the gathering into a family reunion from hell—she comes to discover that the vows she took in life... live on even in death.

Director:  Sébastien Vaniček
Cast:  Souheila Yacoub, Tandi Wright, Hunter Doohan, Luciane Buchanan, Errol Shand, Maude Davey, George Pullar, Greta Van Den Brink

snippet.title: GODZILLA MINUS ZERO | First Look Teaser
snippet.description:
GODZILLA MINUS ZERO
VFX, Written, and Directed by Takashi Yamazaki
In theatres November 6
Follow @godzilla_toho and @GKIDSfilms for more updates!
godzillaminuszero.com

GODZILLA MINUS ZERO picks up in 1949, two years after the tumultuous events of Godzilla Minus One, and continues the story of the Shikishima family as they face an all-new calamity. Additionally confirmed out of CinemaCon, Ryunosuke Kamiki, the hero who faced Godzilla’s terror in Godzilla Minus One, returns as Koichi Shikishima, and is joined by Minami Hamabe as Noriko Oishi, who miraculously survived Godzilla’s first attack on Tokyo.

As a project Filmed For IMAX, GODZILLA MINUS ZERO was shot with high-definition digital cameras certified by IMAX, and optimized in sound and imagery unique to IMAX screens. Fans can look forward to seeing Godzilla presented to all new terrifying heights, making GODZILLA MINUS ZERO in a true cinematic event not to be missed.

snippet.title: INSIDIOUS: OUT OF THE FURTHER - Official Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
The Further comes for our world. 
Watch the official trailer for #Insidious: Out Of The Further - exclusively in theatres this August.


Follow us on social: 
https://www.instagram.com/InsidiousMovie   
https://twitter.com/InsidiousMovie  
https://www.facebook.com/InsidiousMovie  

Visit our site: https://insidious.movie 
Subscribe for more exclusive content: https://www.youtube.com/sonypictures 

Having earned over $740 million at the global box office, the Insidious franchise returns with a new family and a terror that redefines what The Further is capable of.
 
In Insidious: Out of the Further, Amelia Eve stars as Gemma, a young mother raising her daughter in the house she grew up in who discovers she can travel into The Further, the purgatorial realm of lost souls at the heart of the Insidious universe. When something evil comes after her, Gemma discovers an ability that changes everything: she doesn’t just enter The Further, she can bring what lives there back to the real world. Once the demons realize her power, our world becomes their playground.
 
With Lin Shaye reprising her iconic role as Elise Rainier and Jacob Chase (Come Play) directing, Insidious: Out of the Further opens August 21, 2026. Screenplay by Jacob Chase. Story by David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick and Jacob Chase.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: MPL TALK  MALAYSIA S17 WEEK 3 : "MINION" MVP SEBENAR!
snippet.description:
Minggu ketiga membawa perkembangan yang cukup menarik dalam scene MLBB Malaysia, dengan transfer window kini telah dibuka, menyaksikan beberapa pertukaran pemain serta kemasukan import baru, khususnya dari Indonesia.

Namun, dalam masa yang sama, terdapat juga pasukan yang masih belum menunjukkan sebarang perubahan dari segi prestasi, menimbulkan persoalan tentang hala tuju dan strategi mereka untuk musim ini.

Lebih mengejutkan, scene MLBB Malaysia baru-baru ini digemparkan dengan perlawanan antara Flash dan BTRM, di mana game tersebut berakhir dengan kemenangan minion. Apa sebenarnya yang berlaku di sebalik situasi ini?

Dalam episod kali ini, Abang Lord (Host) bersama Nevin Netania (Co-Host) serta guest Rain dan Mars akan mengupas segala isu, analisis gameplay, dan perbincangan hangat sepanjang Week 3 MPL MY.

Saksikan perbincangan penuh untuk memahami apa yang benar-benar berlaku di sebalik setiap perlawanan.

Jangan lupa Like, Comment & Subscribe untuk lebih banyak content MPL Talk setiap minggu

localized.title: MPL TALK  MALAYSIA S17 WEEK 3 : "MINION" MVP SEBENAR!
localized.description:
Minggu ketiga membawa perkembangan yang cukup menarik dalam scene MLBB Malaysia, dengan transfer window kini telah dibuka, menyaksikan beberapa pertukaran pemain serta kemasukan import baru, khususnya dari Indonesia.

Namun, dalam masa yang sama, terdapat juga pasukan yang masih belum menunjukkan sebarang perubahan dari segi prestasi, menimbulkan persoalan tentang hala tuju dan strategi mereka untuk musim ini.

Lebih mengejutkan, scene MLBB Malaysia baru-baru ini digemparkan dengan perlawanan antara Flash dan BTRM, di mana game tersebut berakhir dengan kemenangan minion. Apa sebenarnya yang berlaku di sebalik situasi ini?

Dalam episod kali ini, Abang Lord (Host) bersama Nevin Netania (Co-Host) serta guest Rain dan Mars akan mengupas segala isu, analisis gameplay, dan perbincangan hangat sepanjang Week 3 MPL MY.

Saksikan perbincangan penuh untuk memahami apa yang benar-benar berlaku di sebalik setiap perlawanan.

Jangan lupa Like, Comment & Subscribe untuk lebih banyak content MPL Talk setiap minggu

Lirik 'TIADA PENGGANTI'

[Rizal]
Indahnya melihat kau lari kejar bahagia
Buang apa yang diragu aku ada denganmu sayang
[Ariel]
Jangan lupa apa yang mama sentiasa berkata
Hanya masa yang mampu mengubat hati yang pilu, sungguh
[Pre]
[Daniel]
Segala yang terjadi
Akhirnya aku mengerti
Sayang yang tiada pengganti
Cinta ikhlas ku sepenuh hati

(Chorus)
Andai kau sudah jalani dunia
Rasa manisnya
Bahagia yang kau jumpa
Jika berubah jadi duka
Ku kan ada tuk membalutkan luka
Sayang
